name: Documentation contribution workflow
note: Canonical guide for how to propose and land documentation changes (fork, edit, pull request, review).

name: How to document (writing & style guide)
note: Reference for reStructuredText, rendering, structure and writing conventions used across the manuals.

name: Repository ownership and CODEOWNERS
note: Each active content repository should expose responsible reviewers or at least a domain contact. Prefer CODEOWNERS plus curated people mapping.

name: Generated repository policy
note: Generated repositories should clearly state source-of-truth, update mechanism and whether PRs should target another repository.

name: Repository purpose statement
note: Every repository should have a short README section explaining what it contains, who it is for, how it is published and who reviews changes.
